key_findings.claim: James Webb Space Telescope operates_in infrared astronomy
James Webb Space Telescope studies star formation
James Webb Space Telescope studies early universe
James Webb Space Telescope has_component sunshield
James Webb Space Telescope: A large infrared space telescope launched in 2021 to observe the universe in infrared wavelengths
infrared astronomy: Branch of astronomy that studies celestial objects in infrared radiation
star formation: The process by which dense regions within molecular clouds collapse to form stars
early universe: The period of the universe from the Big Bang to the formation of the first galaxies
sunshield: A five-layer tennis-court-sized shield that protects the telescope from the Sun's heat
